import { CCol, CFormLabel, CRow } from '@coreui/react'; import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { useParams } from 'react-router-dom'; import Linkify from "react-linkify"; import GoBackComponent from 'src/utils/GoBackComponent'; import { getUserViewQueryById } from 'src/components/services/UserViewQuery'; import StatusDrop from 'src/utils/StatusDrop'; import { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid'; function UserViewQueryDetails() { const { id } = useParams(); const [userViewQueryDetails, setUserViewQueryDetails] = useState({}); const getUserViewQueryDetails = async () => { const viewQuery = await getUserViewQueryById(id); if (viewQuery?.code === 200) { setUserViewQueryDetails(viewQuery?.results); } } useEffect(() => { getUserViewQueryDetails(); }, [id]); return ( <>

( {decoratedText} )}> {userViewQueryDetails?.website ? userViewQueryDetails?.website : ""}

( {decoratedText} )}> {userViewQueryDetails?.pageUrl ? userViewQueryDetails?.pageUrl : ""}
) } export default UserViewQueryDetails;
